title: Just Some Useful Blocks
description: Just a mod that adds some quite useful blocks
body:
This mod adds some new blocks that are making game a bit better (or worse).Some of these blocks are: Jump Block - Makes you jump higher while standing on it, Speed Block - Makes you faster while walking on it, and Slippery Block - It's just block that is more slippery than ice. Some other blocks are same as before but anti - just opposite than normal. You can also upgrade them using Nether Star Shards (you can get them by putting normal nether star in crafting).That's pretty much all for now, but I'll try to add more content in the future. Oh, and there's also sugar block that you can make from 9 sugar and turn into 9 sugar.

![Image1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c690c6d69f51d310f2d570ebbdc386b64cf0524e.png)
![Image2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4035f16a4af82d42b933512e2d3eda0723e09a8e.png)
![Image3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c542e5f61747daa40725d6319c608b7cd41ff65.png)

Recommend that you should install [Just Enough Items Mod](https://www.9minecraft.net/just-enough-items-mod/) to view the full recipes included in this mod
